name: @cursor-remote-cursor/vscode-extension
description: Open the mobile web UI for cursor-remote-cursor and check relay health.

commands.title: Cursor Remote: Show Relay Password Hint

cursorRemoteCursor.serverHost.description: Host where the relay HTTP server listens.

cursorRemoteCursor.serverPort.description: Port for the relay HTTP/WebSocket server.

cursorRemoteCursor.passwordFile.description: Optional absolute path to packages/relay/data/.relay-password when running the relay from this repo.
